metadata.description: Violet's curated collection of productivity and development plugins

plugins.name: violet-skilltag-automation
plugins.description: Intelligent skill activation system with bilingual support and SAB priority

plugins.name: font-inspector
plugins.description: Font analysis MCP server with glyph comparison, coverage analysis, and hooks

plugins.name: violet-core
plugins.description: Violet's unified context engine — smart soul loading + MCP server + Rust cipher v4 multi-layer encryption.

plugins.name: lavender-memorysys
plugins.description: Token-efficient encrypted memory system — SQLite + FTS5 with multi-provider embeddings and zero-inject session loading

plugins.name: lylacore
plugins.description: Lylacore — Pure Rust foundational identity architecture for AI agents. Crypto, COACH protocol, and Mind topology via MCP.

plugins.name: error-handling
plugins.description: Cross-language error handling, debugging protocol, and resilience architecture. Evidence-based ACH methodology + 6-phase fix protocol.

plugins.name: tdd-system
plugins.description: Verification-first development engine. Red-Green-Refactor, testing pyramid, regression memory loop, and agentic evaluation.

plugins.name: python-dev-skill
plugins.description: Python development engine. Idiomatic style, async/web (FastAPI/Django), scientific/ML, packaging (uv/ruff), and PyO3 interop.

plugins.name: js-dev-skill
plugins.description: JavaScript and Node.js runtime engine. ES2025+, React architecture, Bun/Vite toolchain, and async/event-loop mastery.

plugins.name: go-coding-engine
plugins.description: Go development engine. Concurrency-first architecture, Clean Architecture patterns, TS7/Corsa compiler backend context, and Go ecosystem mastery.

plugins.name: typescript-coding-engine
plugins.description: TypeScript type-system engine. Strict posture, generics, inference, runtime validation, architecture decisions, and Rust/Tauri interop.

plugins.name: rust-coding-engine
plugins.description: Rust architecture engine. Ownership, async, interop (FFI/PyO3/NAPI/WASM/Tauri), production patterns, and ecosystem navigation.

plugins.name: frontend-dev
plugins.description: Frontend architecture engine. React, Tailwind, accessibility, responsive design, Apple HIG, and cross-platform UI.

plugins.name: backend-dev
plugins.description: Backend architecture engine. API design, database architecture, concurrency patterns, messaging, and microservices.

plugins.name: dev-designer-utility
plugins.description: Design systems engine. Typography engineering, color theory, UX strategy, font engineering, and visual design systems.

plugins.name: planning-strategy
plugins.description: Strategic planning engine. Architecture decisions, task decomposition, PRDs, ADRs, and recall-governed planning.

plugins.name: reviewer-dev
plugins.description: Code review engine. Security auditing, evidence-anchored review, OWASP, and AI-augmented quality gates.

plugins.name: refactor-dev
plugins.description: Refactoring engine. Safe transformation, complexity reduction, performance optimization, and Strangler Fig migration.

plugins.name: documentation-guidelines
plugins.description: Documentation engine. BLUF technical writing, API docs, bilingual strategy, semantic linking, and doc-as-code.

plugins.name: deep-researcher
plugins.description: Research methodology engine. Codebase discovery, web research, fact-checking, semantic reasoning, and multi-source synthesis.

plugins.name: math-skill-system
plugins.description: Mathematical computation engine. Symbolic computation (SymPy), statistics, data science, proofs, and numerical verification.
